content:
They were just being invested in different places.

And so he was like, what is what are your hobbies or what is what comes super easily in?

Naturally to you?

He's like, well, for me, I'm the best dressed person in the room.

You can always count on me that I'm going to be dressed to a T. He was like, I can organize like, motherfucker.

I always know the best party spots.

I know how to get everybody there.

I know what to say to them and I know how to make sure it's cohesive and we all have a killer time.

I know the best bars.

I know the best spots , right?

Like, I have that authority figure.

I have that consistency.

I have that trust.

I have that responsibility and that knowingness, right?

Like, expectation set prior.

And he was like, and so, but I was beating myself up because I was like, I'm such a failure in the business.
